hero.title: Your home away from home
hero.subtitle: Foyer Babel — a modern student residence in the heart of Tunis, designed for students, tech professionals, and ambitious entrepreneurs.

rooms.title: Our Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Spaces designed for your comfort and productivity

individual.name: Individual Room
individual.description: Your personal space to study and rest in complete peace. Single bed, desk, and built-in storage.

double.name: Double Room
double.description: Share your space with a roommate. Two beds, two desks, friendly atmosphere and great value.

triple.name: Triple Room
triple.description: Ideal for friend groups. Three beds, three desks, a generous space to live and study together.

pricing.title: Our Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the room that fits your budget

amenities.title: Our Amenities
amenities.subtitle: Everything you need under one roof

audience.title: Who Is Foyer Babel For?
audience.subtitle: A residence designed for every profile

students.title: Esprit Students
students.description: An ideal setting for academic success. Campus proximity, studious atmosphere, and a supportive student network.

techup.title: TechUp Residents
techup.description: Living space optimized for tech professionals. Ultra-fast WiFi, co-working space, and a developer community.

startup.title: StartupTech Entrepreneurs
startup.description: Launch your startup from your residence. Networking, mentoring, and access to a dynamic entrepreneurial ecosystem.

about.page_subtitle: Discover the history and values that make Foyer Babel a unique place

milestones.title: The Foundation
milestones.description: Foyer Babel was born from a simple vision: to offer Tunisian students a modern and affordable living space. Our founders, former students themselves, understood the challenges of student housing.

milestones.title: First Expansion
milestones.description: Facing growing demand, we opened a second wing with 40 new rooms and introduced our co-working space, which quickly became the beating heart of the residence.

milestones.title: Esprit Partnership
milestones.description: Signing of a strategic partnership with Esprit school, facilitating access to housing for engineering and IT students.

milestones.title: Tech & Innovation Hub
milestones.description: Launch of the TechUp Residents program, transforming the residence into a true innovation hub with weekly workshops, mentoring, and hackathons.

milestones.title: Residence of the Future
milestones.description: Complete renovation with connected rooms, a dedicated mobile app, and premium services. Foyer Babel now welcomes over 200 residents.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To create a living environment that fosters academic excellence, technological innovation, and the personal growth of each resident.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Community, excellence, innovation, and respect. These four pillars guide every decision and improvement we bring to Foyer Babel.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the reference for student residences in Tunisia and North Africa, combining modern comfort with an inspiring community.

footer.tagline: Your modern student residence in the heart of Tunis. Comfort, community, and innovation.
footer.newsletter_text: Receive our latest news and special offers.

individual.long_description: Our individual room is the perfect choice for students seeking a personal and quiet space. Equipped with a comfortable bed, a spacious desk, and built-in storage, this room provides everything you need to succeed in your studies. Abundant natural light and functional design create an atmosphere conducive to study and rest. Shared bathrooms are cleaned daily. At 300 TND per month, it's the ideal solution for a comfortable and private stay.

double.long_description: The double room is designed for students who appreciate social living. Two comfortable beds, two individual desks, and generous storage allow each resident to enjoy their own space while sharing a warm atmosphere. It's the ideal option for those who want to live as a pair while maintaining their independence. The room's smart design optimizes every square meter for your well-being, all for just 200 TND per month.

triple.long_description: The triple room is our most social space, perfect for friend groups or students who love community living. With three comfortable beds, three individual desks, and spacious storage, each resident has their own corner while enjoying a shared and dynamic living environment. The generous 24 m² space ensures everyone's comfort. At only 150 TND per month, it's the best value for an enriching student life.
